Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff American Express Bank, Fsb'S Application For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To C.C.P. Sec. 664.6
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Lisa Dubowski of Michael & Associates telephone number 805-379-8505 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB'S Application For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To C.C.P. Sec. 664.6 is granted. The prevailing party is to provide an order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
